---
title: "TabPFN Practitioner"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: "*.ipynb"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description, reading-time]
  sort: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  table-striped: false
  table-hover: true
---

::: {.site-hero}
For data scientists who have spent years building tabular models with linear models, trees, gradient boosting, and neural nets, TabPFN raises a practical question: if a pretrained tabular model is already competitive with the old defaults, what does the day-to-day work change into?
:::

## Notebook Index
